headline: Cisco Stock Looks Strong, But One Number Says Be Careful
summary: After an 87% run over the last year (as of June 18), it’s hard to find much fault with Cisco Systems (CSCO) stock. The company is posting record revenue, and its AI-related orders are surging. But when a stock is priced for perfection, sitting near its high, the most important signals are often the quiet ones that run counter to the main story.

headline: IQM Named Among Quantum Collaborators in HPE's New Hybrid Quantum-HPC Platform
summary: ESPOO, Finland & PRINCETON, N.J., June 22, 2026--Hewlett Packard Enterprise has named IQM Quantum Computers among the companies collaborating on its hybrid classical-quantum computing platform, announced at HPE Discover Las Vegas.

headline: Schneider Electric Advances Open, Software-Defined Automation at Automate 2026
summary: Schneider Electric, a global energy technology leader, is participating in Automate 2026, North America's largest robotics and automation event, at McCormick Place in Chicago, Illinois (June 22–25). As manufacturers, system integrators, engineering professionals, and industrial leaders from across the world convene to chart the future of automation, Schneider Electric is headlining the show.
